name: Passive Hang
description: Dead hang from the bar; grip strength and shoulder health.

name: Support Hold
description: Straight-arm support on dip bars; the base position for dips and L-sits.

name: Ring Support Hold
description: Straight-arm support on rings; grip, stability and core.

name: RTO Ring Support Hold
description: Rings-turned-out support hold; heavier stabilizer and bicep demand.

name: Inverted Row
description: Bodyweight row under a low bar (australian pull-up).

name: Dips
description: Parallel-bar dips; the fundamental bodyweight push.

name: Toes to Bar
description: Hanging compression raise until the toes touch the bar.

name: Crow Pose
description: Bent-arm balance with knees on elbows; entry point for hand balancing.

name: Archer Push-up
description: One arm does most of the pressing; preparation for the One-Arm Push-up.

name: Bulgarian Push-up
description: Wide, elbows-out ring push-up; intense chest stretch and contraction.

name: Bulgarian Dips
description: Rings flared out during the dip; more stability demand than Ring Dips.

name: Dragon Squat
description: Lowering pistol variation with the free leg wrapped behind; extreme mobility.

name: Reverse Nordic Curl
description: Kneeling backward lean; quad strength through length, knee-friendly.

name: Bridge Hold
description: Full back bridge; spinal extension strength and shoulder flexibility.

name: Legless Rope Climb
description: Rope climb using arms only; pulling strength and grip.

name: Pancake Stretch
description: Straddle forward fold; hip mobility base for straddle skills.

name: Side Split
description: Full lateral split; hip mobility and control.

name: Band Shoulder Dislocates
description: Overhead pass-throughs with a band; shoulder + rotator warm-up staple.

name: Band External Rotation
description: Elbow-pinned external rotation against a band; rotator cuff prep.

name: Band Internal Rotation
description: Elbow-pinned internal rotation against a band; rotator cuff prep.

name: Scapular Push-up
description: Protraction-retraction push-up; scapular control warm-up.

name: Wrist Prep Routine
description: Wrist circles, palm lifts and rocks; before planche/handstand work.

name: Hindu Push-up
description: Flowing dive from pike through hollow to upward dog.

description: Like the Hindu push-up but reversing back along the same path.

description: Bodyweight skull-crusher on a low bar.

description: Underhand inverted row; bicep-focused horizontal pull.

description: Horizontal in-and-out at the top of a chin-up.

name: Human Pullover
description: Drive the body up by pulling the arms down (straight-arm pushdown with bodyweight) — not by curling the trunk with the abs.

description: Scapula-only pull from a dead hang.

name: Cossack Squat
description: Side-to-side deep squat shifting weight between legs.

name: Levitation Squat
description: Single-leg squat with the free shin tucked behind — keeps a neutral pelvis, friendlier than the pistol.

name: Glute Ham Raise
description: Glutes contract and stabilize first so the hamstrings work through a safer, stronger curl.

name: Bent Arm Handstand
description: Handstand held on bent arms; scapula-focused total upper body balance.

description: Planche hold with elastic assistance; ladder step toward the free hold.

description: Front lever hold with elastic assistance; ladder step toward the free hold.
